scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: vitest run src/auth/password.test.ts src/auth/jwt.test.ts src/http/errors.test.ts src/receipts/receipt.validation.test.ts src/receipts/parse-gemini-json.test.ts src/activity/activity.test.ts
scripts.test:db:prepare: dotenv -e .env.test -- node scripts/verify-test-environment.cjs && dotenv -e .env.test -- prisma migrate deploy && dotenv -e .env.test -- prisma generate
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:db:prepare && dotenv -e .env.test -- vitest run src/app.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:integration:cookie: npm run test:db:prepare && dotenv -e .env.test -- vitest run src/auth.cookie.integration.test.ts
